meta.title: Composio App Research Dataset
meta.method: AI training knowledge + targeted web verification

apps.name: Salesforce
apps.description: Enterprise CRM platform with the broadest API ecosystem in CRM
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 (Authorization Code + JWT Bearer Flow); can also use Username-Password flow for connected apps (deprecated). Dev orgs provide free sandbox environments.
apps.gating_details: Free Developer Edition org with full API access. Production requires paid license but dev tiers are free.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP server. Community has some experimental MCP connectors.
apps.main_blocker: Complex auth setup (multiple OAuth flows, IP ranges) and API rate limits. Broad surface but needs careful scope management.

apps.name: HubSpot
apps.description: All-in-one CRM, marketing, sales, and service platform with extensive API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 is primary auth method. Developer API keys still work but deprecated. Private apps use access tokens.
apps.gating_details: Free developer account with API access. Paid plans needed for higher rate limits and some endpoints.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP server. HubSpot has its own AI tools (Breeze, ChatSpot) but no MCP.
apps.main_blocker: Rate limits on free tier (250 req/10sec). Some objects require paid subscriptions. Broad API needs careful scoping.

apps.name: Pipedrive
apps.description: Sales pipeline CRM with focused deal management API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for Marketplace apps. API Key for private integration. Token-based auth available.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available with API access. Paid plans start at $12.50/month.
apps.main_blocker: Smaller API surface than HubSpot/Salesforce. Limited to CRM functions only.

apps.name: Attio
apps.description: Modern, flexible CRM with a developer-first REST API and MCP server
apps.auth_details: API key-based auth via Bearer token in Authorization header. HTTP Basic also supported.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available with API access. Paid plans for higher usage.
apps.mcp_details: Official Attio MCP server announced - provides access to full data model via agent tools.
apps.main_blocker: Relatively newer platform, API is still maturing. Fewer integrations than incumbents.

apps.name: Twenty
apps.description: Open-source CRM with REST + GraphQL APIs, self-hostable
apps.auth_details: API key or Bearer token auth. Self-hosted instances manage their own auth.
apps.gating_details: Open-source, completely free to self-host. Twenty Cloud has free tier.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. As open-source, community could build one easily.
apps.main_blocker: Younger project, API still evolving. Fewer endpoints than Salesforce/HubSpot but growing fast.

apps.name: Podio
apps.description: Citrix-owned customizable work management platform with REST API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for third-party apps. API Key for internal use. Deprecated by Citrix but still operational.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available. But platform is in maintenance mode under Citrix - new developer signups may be restricted.
apps.mcp_details: No MCP. Platform is legacy at this point.
apps.main_blocker: Under Citrix, in maintenance mode. Platform may not be actively developed. Risk of deprecation.

apps.name: Zoho CRM
apps.description: Zoho's CRM offering part of a larger Zoho ecosystem with broad APIs
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 is primary. Legacy auth tokens still work but are deprecated. Self-client grant for server-to-server.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available (3 users). Developer accounts easy to create. Paid plans for more users/features.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. Zoho has its own AI (Zia) but no MCP server.
apps.main_blocker: API documentation quality varies. Zoho ecosystem has many independent APIs that don't always work well together.

apps.name: Close
apps.description: Inside sales CRM with built-in calling, email, and SMS
apps.auth_details: Simple API Key authentication. Keys generated per-user in Close settings.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available. Paid plans start affordably. Developer docs open to all.
apps.main_blocker: API covers CRM operations well but is focused on Close's specific model (leads, activities, call tracking).

apps.name: Copper
apps.description: CRM designed for Google Workspace users with REST API
apps.auth_details: API Key for basic access. OAuth2 available for integrations.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available. Full API access may require paid plan. Some endpoints restricted.
apps.main_blocker: API not as broad as Salesforce/HubSpot. Strong in Google Workspace integration, weaker elsewhere.

apps.name: DealCloud
apps.description: Private equity and investment CRM with comprehensive REST API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for integrations. API keys also supported. Python and C# SDKs available.
apps.gating_details: Enterprise-focused platform. Requires partnership or paid plan. No free developer tier.
apps.mcp_details: No MCP detected. SDKs available for Python and C#.
apps.main_blocker: Enterprise-gated. No self-serve API access. Must be a DealCloud customer with a paid plan.

apps.name: Zendesk
apps.description: Leading customer service platform with extensive REST API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for third-party apps. API tokens for internal integrations. Basic auth (email+password) also supported.
apps.gating_details: Free trial (30 days) available. Developer account with sandbox. Paid plans required for production.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. Third-party MCP integrations may exist.
apps.main_blocker: Rate limits on trial. Some endpoints require specific Zendesk plans. Broad API needs scope management.

apps.name: Intercom
apps.description: Customer communications platform with REST API and AI agents
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for public apps. Personal access tokens for private integrations.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available. Developer hub accessible. Paid plans for production use.
apps.mcp_details: No MCP detected. Intercom has Fin AI assistant but not MCP.
apps.main_blocker: API rate limits. Some data (conversations, articles) has pagination limits.

apps.name: Freshdesk
apps.description: Cloud-based customer support software with REST API
apps.auth_details: Simple API Key + password (Basic Auth). No OAuth2 - uses API key in username field with password 'X'.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (Sprout) available. Developer portal open. Paid plans start at $15/month.
apps.main_blocker: No OAuth2 - uses Basic Auth with API key, less secure. API surface is adequate but not as broad as Zendesk.

apps.name: Front
apps.description: Shared inbox platform for teams with REST API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for partner integrations. API keys for private use.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available. Full API access requires paid plan. Developer docs available.
apps.main_blocker: API covers shared inbox operations well but may lack depth in some areas.

apps.name: Pylon
apps.description: Customer support platform designed for B2B SaaS, with chat and ticketing
apps.auth_details: API Key-based authentication. Newer platform with simpler auth model.
apps.gating_details: Early-stage product. Free trial available but API documentation may be limited. Growing platform.
apps.main_blocker: Newer platform with limited API documentation and smaller endpoint surface. API may still be evolving.

apps.name: LiveAgent
apps.description: Help desk and live chat platform with REST API
apps.auth_details: API Key authentication. Keys generated from LiveAgent admin panel.
apps.gating_details: Free trial (30 days) available. Paid plans start at $9/month. API available on all plans.
apps.main_blocker: API is functional but documentation quality varies. Not as well-known as Zendesk/Intercom.

apps.name: Plain
apps.description: Modern B2B customer support platform with GraphQL API
apps.auth_details: Bearer token auth via PLAIN_TOKEN environment variable. Token-based, GraphQL-only API.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available. Modern platform with good developer docs. API accessible from trial.
apps.mcp_details: No MCP detected. GraphQL API is clean and well-documented.
apps.main_blocker: GraphQL-only (not REST). Smaller ecosystem but well-designed API. Newer platform.

apps.name: Help Scout
apps.description: Simple, customer-focused help desk with REST and Docs APIs
apps.auth_details: API Key passed via HTTP Basic Authentication (username=API key, password='X'). Two APIs: Mailbox API and Docs API.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available. Developer docs open to all. Paid plans for production use.
apps.main_blocker: Basic Auth with API key (no OAuth2). Two separate APIs that could be unified. Smaller surface than Zendesk.

apps.name: Gorgias
apps.description: Ecommerce help desk platform with multi-channel support and REST API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for public apps (requires developer partnership). API key for private integrations.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available. Building a public app requires signing up for developer partnership. API docs accessible.
apps.main_blocker: Public app development requires partnership approval. Private API keys available but with limits.

apps.name: Gladly
apps.description: Customer service platform focused on conversation-centric support
apps.auth_details: API key or bearer token auth. Platform is more closed than competitors.
apps.gating_details: Enterprise-focused. No self-serve developer trial. Requires becoming a customer or partner.
apps.main_blocker: Enterprise-gated. Limited public API documentation. Requires paid Gladly account for API access.

apps.name: Slack
apps.description: Team communication platform with comprehensive APIs, Events API, and Modals
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 exclusively. Bot tokens, user tokens, and incoming webhooks. Granular scopes (OAuth scopes model).
apps.gating_details: Free Slack workspace for development. App creation in API portal is free. No paid account needed for dev.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. Some community MCP servers exist for Slack.
apps.main_blocker: Complex OAuth scope system. Event subscriptions need verification. Socket Mode vs RTM decisions. Rate limits per workspace.

apps.name: Twilio
apps.description: Cloud communications platform for SMS, voice, video, and email via REST APIs
apps.auth_details: Account SID + Auth Token via Basic Auth. Secondary API keys for granular permissions. All API keys created in console.
apps.gating_details: Free trial credits ($15) on signup. Pay-as-you-go. No approval needed to start building.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. Community MCP connectors exist.
apps.main_blocker: Complex product family (SendGrid, Segment, Twilio proper). Each has different API. Trial limited to verified numbers.

apps.name: Zoho Cliq
apps.description: Zoho's team messaging and collaboration platform
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 via Zoho API console. Part of Zoho's unified developer platform.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available (limited users). Zoho developer account is free. Part of Zoho ecosystem.
apps.main_blocker: Documentation is less polished than Slack/Discord. Tied to Zoho ecosystem.

apps.name: Lark (Larksuite)
apps.description: ByteDance's enterprise collaboration platform with open APIs
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 with tenant token and user token model. App credentials issued per app. Two-level token system.
apps.gating_details: Free developer account at open.larksuite.com. App creation is free. Some endpoints may need enterprise plan.
apps.mcp_details: No MCP detected. Likely in development given ByteDance's AI investments.
apps.main_blocker: Two-level auth (tenant + user) adds complexity. Documentation primarily in English but some gaps. China vs International versions differ.

apps.name: Pumble
apps.description: Free team chat app with file sharing, no paid tier needed for full features
apps.auth_details: Limited API availability. Mostly webhook-based integration. No robust REST API found.
apps.gating_details: Free to use. But API documentation is scarce - platform is relatively new.
apps.mcp_details: No MCP. Limited API surface overall.
apps.main_blocker: Very limited or no public REST API. Primarily a webhook consumer. Not suitable for agent toolkit without API expansion.

apps.name: Discord
apps.description: Gaming-adjacent chat platform with comprehensive REST API, Gateway, and Interactions
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for user authorization. Bot tokens for server bots. Rich permissions model.
apps.gating_details: Free developer portal. Create applications and bots without payment. No paid verification needed for basic bot.
apps.mcp_details: Community MCP servers exist for Discord. Not official but well-maintained.
apps.main_blocker: Rate limits are strict (50 req/sec per bot). Gateway connections for real-time. Some endpoints (message history) paginated.

apps.name: Telegram
apps.description: Secure messaging platform with open Bot API and MTProto protocol
apps.auth_details: Simple Bot Token from @BotFather. No OAuth - just a token string passed as Authorization header or query param.
apps.gating_details: Completely free. Create unlimited bots via @BotFather. No paid tier for API access.
apps.mcp_details: Community MCP servers exist for Telegram. Unofficial but functional.
apps.main_blocker: Bot Token only (no OAuth for user accounts). No webhook by default - needs polling or webhook setup. Polling architecture less standard.

apps.name: WhatsApp Business
apps.description: Meta's business messaging platform with Cloud API and On-Premises API
apps.auth_details: Permanent access token via Meta Business Platform. OAuth2 for token generation. Phone number ID + token combo.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available (1,000 conversations/month). Meta Developer account needed. Business Verification may be required.
apps.main_blocker: Business verification required for production. Message templates need approval. Opt-in model before messaging users.

apps.name: Aircall
apps.description: Cloud-based phone system for sales and support teams with REST API
apps.auth_details: API key-based auth via Basic Auth. Keys generated from Aircall dashboard.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available. API access included in paid plans. No free developer-only tier.
apps.main_blocker: API access requires paid account. Webhook-based for real-time events. Voice data (recordings) has privacy restrictions.

apps.name: Vonage
apps.description: Cloud communications (SMS, Voice, Verify, Video) with REST APIs and SDKs
apps.auth_details: API Key + Secret for basic auth. HMAC signature for secure endpoints. JWT for some newer APIs.
apps.gating_details: Free trial credit (€2) on signup. Pay-as-you-go after. No approval needed for development.
apps.main_blocker: Multiple auth models (API Key, JWT, HMAC) for different products. Trial credit limited. Number provisioning for voice needs verification.

apps.name: Google Ads
apps.description: Google's advertising platform with comprehensive REST API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 exclusively. Requires Google Cloud project + OAuth consent screen. Developer token required for production.
apps.gating_details: Free Google Ads manager account needed. Developer token is free but needs application for production access. Test accounts available.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. Google's own AI tools (Gemini) are separate.
apps.main_blocker: Developer token approval process can take days/weeks. OAuth setup is complex (Google Cloud project, consent screen). API has steep learning curve.

apps.name: Meta Ads
apps.description: Facebook and Instagram advertising APIs via Meta Marketing API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 with Meta App. Access tokens for specific ad accounts. App Review required for many endpoints.
apps.gating_details: Meta Developer account is free. But many Marketing API endpoints require App Review + Business Verification. Test users available.
apps.main_blocker: App Review process is notorious. Many endpoints need business verification. API versioning is aggressive (versions deprecated).

apps.name: LinkedIn Ads
apps.description: LinkedIn's B2B advertising and marketing APIs under Microsoft
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 via Microsoft identity platform. Requires Azure AD app registration. App validation needed.
apps.gating_details: Free developer account. Marketing API access requires LinkedIn Page admin + Business verification. Application process.
apps.main_blocker: Multi-level approval: Azure AD app, LinkedIn API access form, Business verification. Heavy documentation. Slower to get access than Google/Meta.

apps.name: GoHighLevel
apps.description: All-in-one marketing and sales platform for agencies with REST API
apps.auth_details: Simple API key authentication. Keys generated from account settings.
apps.gating_details: Paid subscription required ($97+/month). No free developer tier. API accessible on all plans.
apps.main_blocker: No free tier - requires paid subscription. API key-based auth (no OAuth2). Documentation quality is inconsistent.

apps.name: Mailchimp
apps.description: Email marketing platform with REST API and marketing automation
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for third-party apps. API keys for direct integration. Keys scoped to specific data center.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available (500 contacts, 1,000 emails/month). Developer account easy to create.
apps.main_blocker: API keys are datacenter-specific (different base URLs per key). Rate limits on free tier. Some endpoints require higher plans.

apps.name: Klaviyo
apps.description: Ecommerce marketing automation platform with REST API
apps.auth_details: API keys (public + private) for authentication. Separate keys for different scopes.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available (up to 250 contacts). API accessible on free plan.
apps.mcp_details: No MCP detected. Klaviyo's own AI (Klaviyo AI) for campaign generation.
apps.main_blocker: Public/private key model is unusual. API is ecommerce-focused. Rate limits on free tier.

apps.name: systeme.io
apps.description: All-in-one marketing funnel builder with email marketing and sales features
apps.auth_details: API key-based. Limited API documentation. Newer platform.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available (limited features). Paid plans for more functionality.
apps.main_blocker: Limited API documentation and endpoint surface. API may not cover all platform features. Smaller platform ecosystem.

apps.name: Pinterest
apps.description: Visual discovery platform with REST API for pins, boards, and ads
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 with app access token. App registration on Pinterest Developer Portal.
apps.gating_details: Free developer account. App creation is free. Some endpoints (Ads API) require business account.
apps.main_blocker: Different scopes for organic vs ads API. App Review needed for some access levels. API is read/write but limited on write for some objects.

apps.name: Threads (Meta)
apps.description: Meta's text-based conversation app with limited public API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 via Instagram Basic Display API/Threads API. Still in early release.
apps.gating_details: Free Meta Developer account. Threads API is in development/preview. Limited endpoints available.
apps.main_blocker: Threads API is very new and limited. Currently supports posting and basic read. No ads API, no analytics API yet.

apps.name: SendGrid
apps.description: Twilio's email delivery service with REST API and SMTP
apps.auth_details: API Key-based auth (simple). No OAuth2. Keys generated from SendGrid dashboard.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (100 emails/day forever). Pay-as-you-go for more. Twilio account needed.
apps.main_blocker: API key only (no OAuth2). Email sending requires domain authentication (SPF, DKIM). Suppression management. Template management needs API calls.

apps.name: Shopify
apps.description: Leading ecommerce platform with comprehensive GraphQL and REST APIs
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for public apps. Admin API with access tokens. Shopify CLI for app development.
apps.gating_details: Free development stores for building apps. Partner account is free. No credit card needed for dev stores.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. Community projects exist.
apps.main_blocker: OAuth scope negotiation is complex. GraphQL has rate limits based on cost model. REST API being deprecated in favor of GraphQL.

apps.name: WooCommerce
apps.description: Open-source WordPress ecommerce plugin with REST API
apps.auth_details: Consumer Key + Consumer Secret using OAuth1.0a signatures. Basic Auth also supported for SSL connections.
apps.gating_details: Open-source. Self-hosted, so full control. WordPress + WooCommerce are free. API always available.
apps.main_blocker: OAuth1.0a (legacy) auth with signature generation. Self-hosted means varying reliability. WordPress dependency.

apps.name: BigCommerce
apps.description: SaaS ecommerce platform with REST and GraphQL APIs
apps.auth_details: API keys for store-level access. OAuth2 for single-click app installations. Token-based.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available. Dev sandbox for building. Paid plans for production.
apps.main_blocker: API versioning can be confusing (V2 vs V3 for different resources). Some endpoints require specific plan levels.

apps.name: Salesforce Commerce Cloud
apps.description: Enterprise ecommerce platform by Salesforce with REST and SOAP APIs
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 with JWT for server-to-server. Part of Salesforce ecosystem with shared auth patterns.
apps.gating_details: Enterprise Salesforce product. Requires Salesforce account/contract. Developer sandbox available for customers.
apps.main_blocker: Enterprise-gated. Requires Salesforce Commerce Cloud license (very expensive). No free developer tier for Commerce Cloud specifically.

apps.name: Magento (Adobe Commerce)
apps.description: Adobe's enterprise ecommerce platform with REST API
apps.auth_details: Integration access tokens for admin-level API. OAuth1 for third-party apps. Bearer tokens for easier auth.
apps.gating_details: Magento Open Source is free. Adobe Commerce (Enterprise) requires license. Development instances are free to set up.
apps.main_blocker: Architecture complexity (many module-specific APIs). Integration tokens need admin setup. Open source vs Commerce split causes confusion.

apps.name: Squarespace
apps.description: Website builder and commerce platform with REST API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for third-party apps. API keys for Squarespace Commerce API.
apps.gating_details: Developer portal available. API access requires Squarespace account. Some endpoints require paid plan.
apps.main_blocker: API surface is limited compared to Shopify/BigCommerce. Focused on basic commerce operations. Not a full ecommerce platform API.

apps.name: Ecwid
apps.description: Lightweight ecommerce widgets with REST API
apps.auth_details: API key-based auth. Keys generated from Ecwid admin panel.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available (up to 10 products). Paid plans for more features.
apps.main_blocker: Smaller platform with fewer integrations. API is functional but less documented than Shopify.

apps.name: Gumroad
apps.description: Platform for creators to sell digital products with REST API
apps.auth_details: Simple API key auth for personal use. OAuth2 for marketplace integrations.
apps.gating_details: Free to start (Gumroad takes cut). No monthly fee on free plan. Developer docs accessible.
apps.main_blocker: Smaller API surface focused on products, sales, and subscribers. Not a full ecommerce platform.

apps.name: Amazon Selling Partner
apps.description: Amazon's seller API platform for managing listings, orders, and reports
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 exclusively. Requires AWS IAM roles. Complex auth with STS tokens and LWAA (Login with Amazon Authorization).
apps.gating_details: Free to join Selling Partner program. Requires Amazon Seller Central account. Professional seller account ($39.99/month) needed for API access.
apps.main_blocker: Extremely complex auth setup (AWS IAM + SP API + LWAA). Professional seller account required. Rate limits are strict and quota-based.

apps.name: fanbasis
apps.description: Platform for creators and fan communities (limited public information)
apps.auth_details: Likely simple API key auth. Limited public documentation available.
apps.gating_details: Unknown - the platform appears to be a smaller/niche player. Limited public dev portal.
apps.main_blocker: Very limited public API documentation. Unclear if a public API exists for third-party development.

apps.name: DataForSEO
apps.description: SEO and rank tracking data API with comprehensive search data endpoints
apps.auth_details: Login + Password via Basic Auth (to generate session token). Token-based access to API. Custom auth flow.
apps.gating_details: Pay-as-you-go model. Free trial with $50 credit on signup. No approval needed.
apps.main_blocker: Custom auth flow (not standard OAuth2). Pay-per-query pricing model. API is data-only, no write operations.

apps.name: SE Ranking
apps.description: SEO platform with rank tracking, keyword research, and competitor analysis APIs
apps.auth_details: API key-based authentication. Keys generated from SE Ranking account.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available. Paid plans required for ongoing API access.
apps.main_blocker: Smaller platform, less documentation than DataForSEO. API key only (no OAuth2).

apps.name: Ahrefs
apps.description: SEO toolset with backlink analysis, keyword research, and site audit APIs
apps.auth_details: API key-based. Keys linked to Ahrefs subscription tier.
apps.gating_details: Paid plans required ($99+/month). No free tier for API. Trial available.
apps.main_blocker: Relatively expensive API access ($99+/month). Read-only API (data analysis, no write). API key only.

apps.name: MrScraper
apps.description: No-code web scraping platform with API access
apps.auth_details: API key-based auth. Keys from MrScraper dashboard.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available (limited credits). Pay-as-you-go for more.
apps.main_blocker: API is focused on triggering scrapes and retrieving results. Limited to the scraping platform's capabilities.

apps.name: Apify
apps.description: Web scraping and automation platform with extensive API and pre-built actors
apps.auth_details: Personal API token from Apify Console. Bearer token auth. Token controls access level.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (platform credits, limited compute). Pay-as-you-go for more. Developer account is free.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. Apify actors and API are ripe for MCP wrapping.
apps.main_blocker: Token-based auth (no OAuth2). Actor ecosystem is broad but inconsistent in quality. Compute costs for large scrapes.

apps.name: Firecrawl
apps.description: API for converting websites to clean markdown (built for AI/LLM consumption)
apps.auth_details: Simple API key auth. Keys from Firecrawl dashboard.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (500 credits). Pay-as-you-go. Open-source option available.
apps.mcp_details: Firecrawl MCP server is available. Designed for AI/LLM tool use.
apps.main_blocker: Narrow API surface (crawl, scrape, map). Purpose-built tool, not general platform.

apps.name: Bright Data
apps.description: Enterprise web data platform with proxy networks, scraping browser, and datasets
apps.auth_details: API key for proxy access. Bearer token for data APIs.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available. Pay-as-you-go pricing. Enterprise for large-scale.
apps.main_blocker: Premium pricing for production. Proxy infrastructure is complex. Data collector builder is a platform of its own.

apps.name: Sherlock
apps.description: Open-source CLI tool for finding usernames across social networks (not an API platform)
apps.auth_details: No API. It's a CLI tool. Runs locally, scrapes public profiles via web requests.
apps.gating_details: Open-source, free. Self-hosted CLI tool. No cloud API.
apps.mcp_details: Not applicable - it's a CLI tool, not a web API.
apps.main_blocker: Sherlock is a CLI tool, not an API platform. No cloud API to integrate with. Runs as local Python.

apps.name: Waterfall.io
apps.description: Company and contact intelligence platform for sales data enrichment
apps.auth_details: API key-based auth. Keys generated from Waterfall account.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available. Paid plans for ongoing API access.
apps.main_blocker: Narrow API - mainly company/contact lookups. Paid plan required for meaningful use.

apps.name: Clay
apps.description: Data enrichment and sales intelligence platform with multi-source data merging
apps.auth_details: API key-based. Keys from Clay workspace settings.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (limited credits). Paid plans for more. Growing API surface.
apps.main_blocker: API key auth (no OAuth2). Pricing can be high for volume use. Rapidly evolving product.

apps.name: GitHub
apps.description: Code hosting platform with comprehensive REST and GraphQL APIs
apps.auth_details: Multiple auth options: PATs (fine-grained), OAuth2 (web/app flow), GitHub Apps (installation tokens), Device flow for CLI.
apps.gating_details: Free tier with full API access. Higher rate limits on paid plans. No approval needed.
apps.mcp_details: Official GitHub MCP server available. Supports repo management, code operations, PRs, issues.
apps.main_blocker: Multiple auth models can be confusing. GraphQL is preferred for production. PAT fine-grained scoping needs careful management.

apps.name: Vercel
apps.description: Frontend deployment and hosting platform with REST API
apps.auth_details: Personal Access Tokens for API. OAuth2 for third-party integrations.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (Hobby plan) with API access. Paid plans for team features.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. Community MCP connectors may exist.
apps.main_blocker: API is deployment-focused (deployments, domains, projects). Some endpoints require team plan.

apps.name: Netlify
apps.description: Web hosting and serverless platform with REST API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for third-party apps. Personal access tokens for direct API access.
apps.gating_details: Free tier with API access. Paid plans for team features.
apps.main_blocker: Smaller API than Vercel. Some endpoints (analytics, functions logs) have limited surface.

apps.name: Cloudflare
apps.description: CDN, security, and developer platform with extensive REST API
apps.auth_details: API tokens (recommended) with granular scopes. Legacy API key (email + global key). OAuth2 for apps.
apps.gating_details: Free tier with API access. Many endpoints available on free plan. Paid plans for advanced features.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. Cloudflare Workers could build one.
apps.main_blocker: Very broad API with many product-specific areas (DNS, Workers, D1, R2, etc.). API tokens need careful scope management. Free tier rate limits.

apps.name: Supabase
apps.description: Open-source Firebase alternative with PostgreSQL, REST, GraphQL, and Realtime APIs
apps.auth_details: Anon/public key for client-side. Service role key for admin. JWT tokens for user auth. Multiple key types.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (500MB database, 2GB bandwidth). Developer account free. Open-source.
apps.mcp_details: Supabase MCP server is available (community or in development for schema management).
apps.main_blocker: Multiple key types (anon vs service role) can be confusing. Service role key gives full access - must be kept secret.

apps.name: Neo4j
apps.description: Graph database platform with Cypher query API and REST endpoints
apps.auth_details: Basic auth for direct DB access. Bearer token for AuraDB (cloud). SSO/JWT for enterprise.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (AuraDB: 50k nodes). Community edition self-hosted is free. Developer account free.
apps.mcp_details: No MCP detected. Neo4j has GraphQL integration via Neo4j GraphQL library.
apps.main_blocker: Primary API is Cypher query language over Bolt protocol, not REST. REST API exists but is less common. Bolt protocol requires driver.

apps.name: Snowflake
apps.description: Cloud data warehouse with SQL-based API and extensive integrations
apps.auth_details: Key pair auth with JWT for automation. OAuth2 for partner apps. Basic auth for legacy.
apps.gating_details: Free trial (400 credits). Pay-as-you-go for production. No approval needed for trial.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. SQL-based integration likely straightforward to MCP-wrap.
apps.main_blocker: API is SQL-focused and database-oriented. Key pair JWT auth for automation is complex. REST API is thin wrapper around SQL.

apps.name: MongoDB Atlas
apps.description: Managed MongoDB database platform with Data API and admin REST API
apps.auth_details: Programmatic API keys for Atlas admin. Database auth for data access. OAuth2 for Atlas App Services.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (M0: 512MB storage). Pay-as-you-go for more. Developer account free.
apps.mcp_details: MongoDB MCP server is available (community). Allows querying and managing collections.
apps.main_blocker: Admin API and Data API are separate. Admin API manages clusters; Data API (Atlas Data API) accesses data via HTTPS. Distinct auth models.

apps.name: Datadog
apps.description: Monitoring and observability platform with extensive REST API
apps.auth_details: API key (public) + Application key (secret) combination. Two-key model across all endpoints.
apps.gating_details: Free trial (full features, 14 days). Pay-as-you-go. API accessible during trial.
apps.main_blocker: Two-key auth model (API + App key) adds setup complexity. Very broad API surface (100+ endpoints across many products). Rate limits on trial.

apps.name: Sentry
apps.description: Error tracking and performance monitoring platform with REST API
apps.auth_details: User auth tokens for personal access. Organization auth tokens for team. OAuth2 for integrations.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (5k events/month, 1 user). Paid plans for more. Developer account free.
apps.mcp_details: No MCP detected. Sentry's own AI is for issue grouping, not MCP.
apps.main_blocker: API is organized around projects/organizations. Event data queries can be complex. Rate limits on free tier.

apps.name: Notion
apps.description: All-in-one workspace with REST API for pages, databases, and blocks
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for public integrations. Internal integration secrets for private use. Both use Bearer token pattern.
apps.gating_details: Free Notion account + free integration creation. No approval needed for internal integrations.
apps.mcp_details: Official Notion MCP server is available. Supports page/database CRUD operations.
apps.main_blocker: Rate limits (3 req/sec for internal). API covers pages, databases, blocks but not all Notion features. No search endpoint in basic API.

apps.name: Airtable
apps.description: Spreadsheet-database hybrid with REST API and scripting capabilities
apps.auth_details: API keys (legacy, personal). OAuth2 (newer, for distributed apps). Personal Access Tokens available.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (unlimited bases, 1k records/base). API accessible on free plan.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. Community MCP connectors exist.
apps.main_blocker: API is base/table/record oriented. Record limits on free plan. Webhook support limited. OAuth2 migration in progress.

apps.name: Linear
apps.description: Modern issue tracking and project management with GraphQL API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for integrations. Personal API keys for direct access. GraphQL-only API.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (up to 10 users). API accessible on free plan. Developer account free.
apps.mcp_details: Official Linear MCP server available. Supports full issue/project management via agent tools.
apps.main_blocker: GraphQL-only (no REST). Requires understanding of GraphQL queries. Rate limits on free tier.

apps.name: Jira
apps.description: Atlassian's industry-standard issue tracking and project management platform
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for Atlassian Connect apps. API tokens for personal access. Basic auth deprecated.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (up to 10 users). Cloud instance for development. Marketplace for apps.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. Atlassian's own AI (Atlassian Intelligence) is separate.
apps.main_blocker: Complex API with versioning quirks. Cloud vs Server API differences. OAuth scopes are granular but confusing. Rate limits on free tier.

apps.name: Asana
apps.description: Work management platform with REST API and GraphQL option
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for public integrations. PAT for personal API access.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (basic features). Developer account free. API accessible on free plan.
apps.main_blocker: API covers tasks, projects, sections, but some operations need multiple calls. Rate limits: 150 req/min per PAT.

apps.name: Monday.com
apps.description: Visual project management platform with REST API and GraphQL
apps.auth_details: API v1 uses tokens. API v2 uses OAuth2. Multiple board/item structure can be complex.
apps.gating_details: Free tier (2 users, limited boards). Developer account free. API accessible on free plan.
apps.main_blocker: API v1 vs v2 confusion. GraphQL API v2 is primary now. Board structure is flexible but complex to query.

apps.name: ClickUp
apps.description: All-in-one project management platform with extensive REST API
apps.auth_details: Simple API key authentication. Keys generated per workspace.
apps.gating_details: Free Forever plan with API access. Paid plans for advanced features and higher limits.
apps.mcp_details: No MCP detected. ClickUp has its own AI (ClickUp AI).
apps.main_blocker: API key only (no OAuth2 for native integrations). Very broad API but documentation quality varies. Rate limits: 100 req/min.

apps.name: Coda
apps.description: Collaborative document platform with REST API and packs (plugins)
apps.auth_details: API tokens for personal use. OAuth2 for Packs (Coda's plugin system).
apps.gating_details: Free tier with API access. Packs development is free. Paid plans for doc size limits.
apps.main_blocker: API is doc/table/row oriented. Packs are the extension mechanism, not a pure API. Smaller ecosystem.

apps.name: Smartsheet
apps.description: Enterprise work management platform with REST API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for integrations. Bearer tokens for direct API access.
apps.gating_details: Free trial available. Paid plans required for ongoing API access. Developer docs accessible.
apps.main_blocker: Enterprise-focused pricing. Sheet/row model is different from other PM tools. Some features require specific plan levels.

apps.name: Harvest
apps.description: Time tracking and invoicing platform with REST API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for third-party apps. PAT for direct API access (uses Basic Auth with token).
apps.gating_details: Free tier (2 projects, unlimited time tracking). Paid plans for invoicing and team features.
apps.main_blocker: Niche API focused on time tracking and expenses. Invoice and budget features limited on free plan.

apps.name: Stripe
apps.description: Global payment processing platform with one of the best-designed APIs in fintech
apps.auth_details: Secret key for server-side. Publishable key for client-side. No OAuth2 for direct access (OAuth for Stripe Connect).
apps.gating_details: Free to create account. Test mode available without live credentials. Pay-as-you-go pricing.
apps.mcp_details: Stripe MCP server is available (community-built). Allows agent access to Stripe operations.
apps.main_blocker: API key only for own account (Connect OAuth for third-party). Event-driven architecture (webhooks) for async operations. Idempotency keys required for safety.

apps.name: Plaid
apps.description: Financial data aggregation platform connecting apps to bank accounts
apps.auth_details: Client ID + Secret for API auth. OAuth2 for re-authentication flows. Link tokens for Plaid Link integration.
apps.gating_details: Free Sandbox environment for development. Production requires going through Plaid's onboarding.
apps.main_blocker: Sandbox vs Production access gating. OAuth re-auth flows are complex. Requires financial data regulations compliance.

apps.name: Binance
apps.description: Largest cryptocurrency exchange with extensive REST and WebSocket APIs
apps.auth_details: API key + secret with HMAC SHA256 signatures. RSA key pair also supported. Rate-limited by API key type.
apps.gating_details: Free Binance account. API key generation is free. Different verification levels grant different access.
apps.mcp_details: No official MCP. Community projects may exist.
apps.main_blocker: HMAC signature generation for every request. WebSocket streams for real-time data. Regulatory restrictions in some regions.

apps.name: Paygent Connect
apps.description: Payment gateway powered by NMI (formerly Paygent)
apps.auth_details: API key-based auth. Tokenization for payment processing. Relatively smaller payment platform.
apps.gating_details: Requires merchant account and underwriting. No free developer tier. Partnership/contract needed.
apps.main_blocker: Requires active merchant account. Limited public documentation. NMI-powered but rebranded, adds complexity.

apps.name: iPayX
apps.description: Payment processing and gateway platform
apps.auth_details: API key-based auth. Limited public documentation available.
apps.gating_details: Requires merchant account. No public free tier. Partnership likely needed.
apps.main_blocker: Very limited public documentation. Requires payment processing account. Smaller platform with less developer focus.

apps.name: QuickBooks
apps.description: Intuit's accounting platform with OAuth2-based API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 exclusively (OAuth1 retired). Intuit's OAuth2 flow with discovery URL. Scopes per accounting entity.
apps.gating_details: Free developer account with sandbox companies. Production access requires QuickBooks subscription or Intuit partnership.
apps.mcp_details: No MCP detected. Intuit's AI is separate (Intuit Assist).
apps.main_blocker: OAuth2 setup is more complex than typical (discovery URL, realm ID). Sandbox vs production migration has specific steps. Rate limits per realm.

apps.name: Xero
apps.description: Online accounting platform with REST API and OAuth2
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 exclusively. Xero's OAuth2 with PKCE. Connection model (tenant-based).
apps.gating_details: Free developer account (25 connections, 3 months free). Demo company available. Free tier accounting available.
apps.main_blocker: OAuth2 with PKCE adds complexity. Tenant/connection model requires multi-org handling. API is accounting domain-specific.

apps.name: Brex
apps.description: Corporate card and spend management platform with REST API
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for integrations. API keys for direct access.
apps.gating_details: Brex account required. Free tier for startups. API accessible with account.
apps.main_blocker: Requires active Brex account (business/corporate card). API is spend-and-expense focused. Some endpoints may need admin approval.

apps.name: Ramp
apps.description: Corporate spend management with REST API
apps.auth_details: API key-based auth. Keys generated from Ramp dashboard.
apps.gating_details: Ramp corporate account required. No free developer-only tier. API access included with account.
apps.main_blocker: Requires active Ramp account (US business only). API is spend management focused. Newer API surface.

apps.name: PitchBook
apps.description: Private market data and research platform (no public API)
apps.auth_details: No public API. PitchBook data is accessed through their platform UI or data feeds via partnership.
apps.gating_details: Enterprise subscription required (very expensive). No free tier. Data provided via partnership agreements.
apps.mcp_details: No MCP. No public API at all.
apps.main_blocker: No public API. Data access is via enterprise license only. Partnership or data feed agreement required.

apps.name: NotebookLM
apps.description: Google's AI-powered research and note-taking assistant (limited API)
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 via Google Cloud. NotebookLM is a consumer product with limited API surface.
apps.gating_details: Free to use via Google account. API access is limited - NotebookLM isn't designed as a developer platform.
apps.mcp_details: No MCP. NotebookLM is a UI product, not an API platform.
apps.main_blocker: NotebookLM has no public API for programmatic access. It's a consumer AI product, not a developer platform. Gemini API is the programmatic alternative.

apps.name: Otter AI
apps.description: AI meeting assistant with transcription and note-taking
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for integrations. API for retrieving transcripts and meeting data.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available. Otter API access may require Business or Enterprise plan.
apps.mcp_details: Otter AI has an MCP server available for agent integration.
apps.main_blocker: Free tier API access may be limited. Meeting data access requires authorization. Transcription accuracy depends on audio quality.

apps.name: Fathom
apps.description: AI meeting assistant with real-time transcription and summarization
apps.auth_details: Likely OAuth2 for integrations. Meeting data accessible via API for subscribers.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available. API access may require paid plan.
apps.main_blocker: Limited public API documentation. Fathom is primarily a consumer product with limited developer platform.

apps.name: Consensus
apps.description: AI search engine for scientific research papers
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 has been requested by developers. API key currently available for access.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available. API access may have usage limits on free tier.
apps.main_blocker: Narrow API - focused on paper search and consensus measurement. Limited to academic research use case.

apps.name: Reducto
apps.description: AI-powered document parsing and extraction API
apps.auth_details: Simple API key authentication. Purpose-built for document processing.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available. Pay-as-you-go for more volume.
apps.main_blocker: Narrow API surface - document parsing only. Purpose-built tool, not a platform.

apps.name: Devin
apps.description: AI software engineering agent platform with API and MCP
apps.auth_details: API key-based. Devin exposes MCP for tool integration.
apps.gating_details: Waitlist/beta access. Not fully open for self-serve yet. Limited availability.
apps.mcp_details: Devin has an MCP server enabling other agents/dev tools to interact with it.
apps.main_blocker: Still in limited beta/waitlist. Not generally available. API surface is evolving.

apps.name: higgsfield
apps.description: AI content creation suite with CLI tools and API
apps.auth_details: API key-based auth. CLI tool available for automation.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available. Paid plans for higher usage.
apps.main_blocker: Smaller platform, limited public developer documentation. API surface may not cover all product features.

apps.name: Mermaid CLI
apps.description: CLI tool for generating diagrams from Markdown-like Mermaid syntax
apps.auth_details: No API. It's a CLI tool (npm package). Runs locally.
apps.gating_details: Open-source, free. Installed via npm. No cloud service.
apps.mcp_details: Not applicable. CLI tool, not an API.
apps.main_blocker: Mermaid CLI is a local rendering tool, not an API platform. No cloud API to integrate with.

apps.name: YouTube Transcript
apps.description: API for fetching YouTube video transcripts/captions
apps.auth_details: API key-based auth. Simple REST API for transcript retrieval.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available. Pay-as-you-go for volume. No YouTube account needed.
apps.mcp_details: MCP server available for YouTube transcript retrieval in agent tools.
apps.main_blocker: Narrow API - transcripts only. Depends on YouTube captions being available. Language limitations.

apps.name: Grain
apps.description: AI meeting recording and highlight platform
apps.auth_details: OAuth2 for integrations. API for retrieving recordings and highlights.
apps.gating_details: Free tier available. API access may require paid plan.
apps.main_blocker: API surface is limited to meeting recordings and highlights. Smaller platform. Paid API access likely needed.
